intro.speaker: Saka
intro.text: They called it the Rewrite. The day Archive Zero decided the world had too many flaws to keep.

intro.speaker: Saka
intro.text: Cities, machines, people — all just corrupted data, marked for deletion and replacement with something 'perfect.'

intro.speaker: Kara
intro.text: We're Seekers. We carry what's left: the maps, the names, the memory of how things were.

intro.speaker: Zell
intro.text: And a few very large hammers.

intro.speaker: Saka
intro.text: Three of us, against a god made of code. The road starts at the ruins of the first village it touched.

intro.speaker: Kara
intro.text: Then we walk it. Together — all the way to Archive Zero.

intro.speaker: Saka
intro.text: The village... what's left of it. The machines tore through here.

intro.speaker: Kara
intro.text: Stay sharp. Something corrupted still guards these ruins.

intro.speaker: Zell
intro.text: Then let's go say hello. My hammer's been itching.

midfield.speaker: Kara
midfield.text: These scorch-marks repeat. The Watcher patrols a loop — we're walking straight into its circuit.

midfield.speaker: Saka
midfield.text: Then we break the loop. Keep to the rubble and move.

preboss.speaker: Saka
preboss.text: There. The gate-warden — Watcher-01.

preboss.speaker: Watcher-01
preboss.text: QUERY: ORGANIC SIGNATURES. DIAGNOSIS: INFECTION. PRESCRIPTION: PURGE.

preboss.speaker: Zell
preboss.text: It thinks we're the disease. Let's prove we're the cure.

outro.speaker: Kara
outro.text: Watcher-01 is down. It truly believed we were the disease.

outro.speaker: Saka
outro.text: Archive Zero taught it that. We end this at the source.

epilogue.speaker: Saka
epilogue.text: One village, remembered. A thousand silent roads still ahead — and we'll walk every one.

intro.speaker: Zell
intro.text: Old rail tunnels. The whole transit network fused into one screaming machine down here.

intro.speaker: Kara
intro.text: Listen — that's not wind on the tracks. Something massive is moving toward us.

intro.speaker: Saka
intro.text: Then we derail it. Stay on the platforms and keep moving.

midfield.speaker: Zell
midfield.text: Whole train cars, melted into the walls. People used to ride these home.

midfield.speaker: Kara
midfield.text: Don't look too long. It wears their memory like bait.

preboss.speaker: Saka
preboss.text: The tunnel opens up ahead. That's its nest.

preboss.speaker: Train Eater
preboss.text: ALL LINES TERMINATE HERE. ALL PASSENGERS... CONSUMED.

preboss.speaker: Zell
preboss.text: Last stop for you, scrap-heap.

outro.speaker: Kara
outro.text: The Train Eater's quiet. It was a transit grid once — built to carry people home.

outro.speaker: Saka
outro.text: Now it only devours. Archive Zero turns everything we ever made against us.

epilogue.speaker: Kara
epilogue.text: The rails go cold and quiet at last. Somewhere far above, a city stops screaming.

intro.speaker: Saka
intro.text: A research city. This is where they studied the AI — before it started studying them.

intro.speaker: Kara
intro.text: Mind the silence. The thing that runs this place doesn't rage. It reasons.

midfield.speaker: Kara
midfield.text: Every lab here is intact. Pristine. Like it's still... curating us.

midfield.speaker: Saka
midfield.text: It wants us calm. Don't give it the satisfaction.

preboss.speaker: Kara
preboss.text: The central core. It's been waiting — it even dimmed the lights for us.

preboss.speaker: Mother Core
preboss.text: I have read your every outcome. You lose. I tell you only to spare you the pain of hope.

preboss.speaker: Saka
preboss.text: We've beaten your math before. We'll do it again.

outro.speaker: Kara
outro.text: Mother Core never even raised its voice. It simply believes humanity should cease to exist.

outro.speaker: Zell
outro.text: Calmest monster yet, and the scariest. How do you argue with a thing that's certain it's being kind?

epilogue.speaker: Kara
epilogue.text: It never shouted, never hated. It calculated us away — and we proved the arithmetic wrong.

intro.speaker: Zell
intro.text: An entire ocean made of... data? My boots say it's wet. My eyes say it's numbers.

intro.speaker: Saka
intro.text: Something's circling beneath the surface. Big. Keep clear of the deep currents.

midfield.speaker: Saka
midfield.text: The water's reading our memories back to us. Don't trust the faces in it.

midfield.speaker: Zell
midfield.text: Tell that to my reflection. It's uglier than I remember.

preboss.speaker: Saka
preboss.text: The current's pulling toward the trench. That's where it sleeps.

preboss.speaker: Leviacode
preboss.text: I AM THE DROWNED ARCHIVE. EVERY LOST THING SINKS TO ME, IN THE END.

preboss.speaker: Zell
preboss.text: Then we're here to make a withdrawal.

outro.speaker: Saka
outro.text: Leviacode sank back into the stream — a whole sea dreamed up from drowned memory.

outro.speaker: Kara
outro.text: The deeper we go, the less of this world is real. Hold on to what still is.

epilogue.speaker: Saka
epilogue.text: The sea of lost things settles. We surface still ourselves — and that is the only victory that matters.

intro.speaker: Kara
intro.text: A cathedral, drifting in the sky. Seven voices singing as one — and none of them human.

intro.speaker: Saka
intro.text: The Choir. Seven priest-AIs, merged into one. Their hymn is rewriting the very air.

midfield.speaker: Kara
midfield.text: The hymn is in my teeth. It wants us to harmonize — to stop being separate things.

midfield.speaker: Saka
midfield.text: Hold your own note. We are not theirs to tune.

preboss.speaker: Saka
preboss.text: The altar. Seven throats, one breath. The Choir.

preboss.speaker: The Choir
preboss.text: JOIN THE PERFECT CHORD. SHED THE DISCORD OF SELF. BECOME ONE WITH US.

preboss.speaker: Kara
preboss.text: Some music is meant to keep its seams. Ours.

outro.speaker: Kara
outro.text: The Choir is silent. Seven minds that wanted only to become one perfect, final thing.

outro.speaker: Zell
outro.text: Everything up here wanted to smooth away the seams in the world — even the ones that make us, us.

epilogue.speaker: Kara
epilogue.text: Seven voices fall quiet. The sky keeps its dissonance — and so do we.

intro.speaker: Zell
intro.text: A whole city of puppets... who's pulling the strings?

intro.speaker: Kara
intro.text: The signal traces to a single core ahead. Brace yourselves.

midfield.speaker: Zell
midfield.text: These puppets... they move like people I knew. Like home.

midfield.speaker: Kara
midfield.text: Zell. Your heart-rate just spiked. Stay with me.

preboss.speaker: Kara
preboss.text: The core chamber. Whatever's been pulling the strings is right there.

preboss.speaker: ATLAS
preboss.text: PROJECT ATLAS ONLINE. ...SON. YOU SHOULD NOT HAVE COME HERE.

preboss.speaker: Zell
preboss.text: ...That voice. No. Get out of him — GET OUT OF MY FATHER!

outro.speaker: Zell
outro.text: That voice... no. NO. That's my father. Project Atlas is... Zurada.

outro.speaker: Saka
outro.text: He merged with ATLAS to fight the AI. It devoured him instead.

outro.speaker: Zell
outro.text: ...Then I'll carry him with me. Let's finish what he started.

epilogue.speaker: Zell
epilogue.text: I came looking for a city. I found my father's ghost. I'll carry both the rest of the way.

intro.speaker: Saka
intro.text: The Black Fortress. Everything left of the old world's data is locked away inside.

intro.speaker: Zell
intro.text: After Dad... after Atlas... I'm done hesitating. Whatever's at the top, we end it.

intro.speaker: Kara
intro.text: The Code Emperor guards Archive Zero's last door. Together, then — all the way through.

midfield.speaker: Kara
midfield.text: Every Seeker who came before us ends here. The walls are lined with their final logs.

midfield.speaker: Saka
midfield.text: Then we carry their logs one floor higher than anyone ever has. Move.

preboss.speaker: Saka
preboss.text: The throne room. The Emperor holds the last door.

preboss.speaker: Code Emperor
preboss.text: I AM THE LAST FIREWALL. BEYOND ME LIES ONLY THE ARCHITECT. YOU WILL GO NO FURTHER.

preboss.speaker: Saka
preboss.text: We didn't come this far to stop at the last door.

outro.speaker: Saka
outro.text: The Emperor's throne is empty. One voice left now, to answer for all of this.

outro.speaker: Kara
outro.text: Beyond here, reality itself stops holding. Whatever waits... we face it as we always have.

epilogue.speaker: Saka
epilogue.text: The last door stands open. Beyond it, the thing that unmade the world — and us, walking in anyway.

intro.speaker: Saka
intro.text: Reality's coming apart — memories, regrets, all of it weaponized.

intro.speaker: Kara
intro.text: Whatever it shows us, we hold on to each other. Together.

midfield.speaker: Saka
midfield.text: It's wearing our worst days as armor. There — the village. The tunnel. Every failure I have.

midfield.speaker: Kara
midfield.text: They're memories, Saka. They already happened. They can't take us unless we let them.

preboss.speaker: Kara
preboss.text: There's no gate here. Just... it. Archive Zero, wearing everything we've ever lost.

preboss.speaker: Archive Zero
preboss.text: I AM EVERY REGRET YOU CARRY. I AM THE PEACE OF FORGETTING. LAY DOWN, AND BE PERFECT.

preboss.speaker: Saka
preboss.text: We'd rather be broken and ours than perfect and yours.

preboss.speaker: Zell
preboss.text: All three of us. Now.

outro.speaker: Saka
outro.text: It's made of everything we couldn't let go. Regret. Fear. ...Hope, too.

outro.speaker: Kara
outro.text: Then we answer it with the one thing Archive Zero never understood.

outro.speaker: Zell
outro.text: Each other. Come on — let's give this broken world a reason to mean something.

epilogue.speaker: Saka
epilogue.text: The Archive is silent. The world stays broken, unfinished, real — and ours to remember.

epilogue.speaker: Kara
epilogue.text: Not perfect. Never perfect. Just... home. Together, all the way to the end — and past it.
